subheadings.usage: H3, H4, Card Titles, Tab Names, Overlines

mono.usage: Tabular data, transaction amounts, dates, XP numbers, toasts

component_guidelines.cards: Use flat surfaces (no glassmorphism) to keep the UI sharp. Background #0C0C14. Sharp corners (rounded-none). Use 1px solid border (#27273A). Add a 2px left border in Primary (#00F0FF) to mimic HUD brackets. On hover: border glows slightly, subtle lift.
component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp rectangular (rounded-none). Default state: transparent background with Primary border and Primary text. On hover: Primary background, Black text, heavy box-shadow drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)].
component_guidelines.inputs: Flat, background #050505, 1px border (#27273A). Focus state MUST use primary color border with a subtle outer glow.
component_guidelines.tables: Dense layout. Use JetBrains Mono for numerical data and dates. Hover states on rows should have a very subtle cyan tint background (#00F0FF/10).
component_guidelines.tabs: Sharp edges, segmented controls. Active tab has a neon bottom border or fully neon background with black text. Inactive tabs are muted.
component_guidelines.progress_bars: XP-bar style. Segmented blocks or continuous neon gradient (e.g., from #B026FF to #00F0FF). Must have a glow effect.
component_guidelines.modals: Dark overlay (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm). Modal window has retro-futuristic borders (e.g., 1px solid cyan, with inner glow).
component_guidelines.toasts: Terminal/Arcade style using sonner. Dark background, monospace font. Success toast: 'ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED' in neon green. Error: 'SYSTEM FAILURE' in neon red.
component_guidelines.charts: Use Recharts with dark theme. Line/Bar colors must be neon (#00F0FF, #FF0055, #B026FF). Grid lines should be faint (#27273A). Tooltips must have dark backgrounds and sharp borders.

images.description: Abstract streaks of colorful neon lights against dark background, to be used for the auth screen split visual to set the cyberpunk tone.
Vibrant geometric neon design, can be used as a subtle overlay or header background texture at very low opacity (5%).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='new-transaction-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in pt-BR. Combine gamified terminology with standard finance terms (e.g., 'Metas (Quests)', 'Saldo (Créditos)', 'Transações (Quest Log)').
Implement the Auth screen, Dashboard with 3 summary cards, Alerts panel, and Tabs (Lista/Gráficos/Metas).
Use CountUp (react-countup) for the summary card numbers. Use Orbitron font for these.
Add Recharts BarChart (Receitas vs Despesas) and PieChart (Despesas por categoria), fully customized with the neon palette.
Implement the Goals section as 'Quests' with progress bars mimicking RPG XP bars. Include a deposit modal.
Ensure the New Transaction and New Goal modals use the 'Gamer' dark styling, and use an emoji picker for the goals.
Add CSV and PDF export functionality for the transactions table.
Use framer-motion for glitch hover effects, list entrance staggers, and modal animations.
Replace Shadcn's default rounded styles with `rounded-none` across the board to maintain the sharp, hard-edge gamer aesthetic.
